problem: What risks could kill this product in 90 days?

blueprint.hiddenPain: The decision pressure is real, but the underlying pain needs sharper definition.

strategistView.biggestUpside: The biggest upside is capturing signal before competitors or hesitation close the window.
strategistView.leverageMove: Use a staged commitment that creates evidence without overexposing the downside.

skepticView.hiddenFlaw: The hidden flaw is assuming intent will convert into reliable behavior.
skepticView.whatCouldBreak: Execution quality, timing, or trust could break before the upside appears.

operatorNextSteps: Assign one owner and one success metric.
blueprint.redTeamCritique: The strongest attack is that the decision may scale risk faster than learning.
blueprint.economistView: The opportunity cost is capital, attention, and time that cannot be reused if the bet is wrong.

counterfactualPaths.name: Proceed Now
counterfactualPaths.likelyUpside: The biggest upside is capturing signal before competitors or hesitation close the window.
counterfactualPaths.keyFailureMode: Execution quality, timing, or trust could break before the upside appears.

counterfactualPaths.name: Delay
counterfactualPaths.reducedRisk: More time to validate evidence before scaling commitment.
counterfactualPaths.opportunityCost: The opportunity cost is capital, attention, and time that cannot be reused if the bet is wrong.

counterfactualPaths.name: Do Nothing
counterfactualPaths.probableDownside: The window narrows while uncertainty stays unresolved.
counterfactualPaths.hiddenRiskAccumulation: Inaction compounds ambiguity and slows organizational learning.

executionPlan.objective: Define the test boundary and the one assumption being validated.
executionPlan.metric: Qualified participants, activation, and first useful signal.
executionPlan.killCriteria: No qualified users, unclear owner, or no measurable behavior by the end of the week.
executionPlan.goNoGoThreshold: Go if at least 5 qualified users complete the test setup and one metric can be tracked.

executionPlan.objective: Run the experiment with real users or real operating constraints.
executionPlan.experiment: Assign one owner and one success metric.
executionPlan.metric: Activation rate, completion rate, time-to-value, and qualitative friction.
executionPlan.killCriteria: Users do not engage, cannot explain the value, or require manual rescue to complete the flow.
executionPlan.goNoGoThreshold: Go if 40% or more complete the core action and can name the value without prompting.

executionPlan.objective: Stress-test retention, willingness to pay, or repeat behavior.
executionPlan.metric: Repeat usage, conversion intent, willingness to pay, referral, or retained engagement.
executionPlan.killCriteria: Interest drops after novelty, users avoid commitment, or the cost to support them is too high.
executionPlan.goNoGoThreshold: Go if retained usage or commitment clears the pre-set success metric.

executionPlan.objective: Decide scale, redesign, delay, or kill based on evidence.
executionPlan.experiment: Compare results against thresholds and make the go / no-go decision.
executionPlan.metric: Evidence strength, risk reduction, resource cost, and confidence delta.
executionPlan.killCriteria: Core assumption remains unproven or the next phase requires disproportionate resources.
executionPlan.goNoGoThreshold: Go only if the evidence supports the next commitment without weakening runway or focus.

diagnosis.blindSpots: Overestimating internal velocity and underestimating competitive response.
diagnosis.keyRisks: The Skeptic warns of high resource drain and potential brand dilution if the MVP fails to deliver premium value.

safe.description: Maintain current trajectory while running low-cost experiments.

balanced.description: The Operator's recommended path: Phased rollout over 12 weeks.

bold.description: The Strategist's vision: Aggressive pivot to capture the market immediately.

contrarianInsight.perspective: What if the market doesn't want an OS, but just a better single tool?
contrarianInsight.hiddenOpportunity: Niche dominance in the 'Founder' segment before going broad.
contrarianInsight.uncomfortableTruth: Your current team might not have the specific AI expertise for a full-scale engine.

futureSimulation.threeMonths: Early feedback confirms core value, but UI complexity is a hurdle.
futureSimulation.twelveMonths: SolveOS becomes the standard for high-stakes decisions in mid-market firms.

actionPlan.today: Lock down MVP spec by EOD and define success metrics.
actionPlan.thisWeek: Set up core LangGraph nodes for Strategist and Skeptic agents.
actionPlan.thirtyDays: Deploy initial alpha to 5 trusted testers for feedback.

council.resolutionPath: Moderate agreement with manageable risks: Pilot with safeguards.

scenarioBranches.description: Perfect execution: market embrace, zero churn, rapid adoption by founders

question: Should I launch SolveOS to 50 beta users this month?
verdict: Reversible Experiment: derive the verdict from the exact decision question before committing reputation, capital, or team focus.

problem: Сможет продукт решать боль лучше чем ChatGPT/Claude?

blueprint.recommendation: Рекомендуется поэтапный запуск с контролируемым риском. Потенциал рынка подтвержден, однако операционная сложность требует жесткого управления этапами реализации.

diagnosis.coreProblem: Стратегическая экспансия в невалидированный сегмент с высоким порогом входа.
diagnosis.blindSpots: Критическая переоценка операционной скорости и недооценка агрессивности конкурентного ответа.
diagnosis.keyRisks: Скептик указывает на риск нецелевого сжигания капитала (burn rate) и размытие ценности бренда при отсутствии четкого MVP.

safe.description: Консервативная траектория: запуск серии низкозатратных экспериментов без изменения основного продукта.

balanced.description: Сбалансированная стратегия (рекомендация Оператора): фазовое развертывание в течение 12 недель с жесткими KPI.

bold.description: Founder Mode (Видение Стратега): агрессивный захват доли рынка через массированные инвестиции в рост.

contrarianInsight.perspective: Что если рынку не нужна комплексная ОС, а требуется лишь точечное решение критической боли?
contrarianInsight.hiddenOpportunity: Доминирование в узком сегменте 'Founders & VC' перед масштабированием на масс-маркет.
contrarianInsight.uncomfortableTruth: Текущий технический стек может не выдержать нагрузку при масштабировании до полноценного движка решений.

futureSimulation.threeMonths: Ранняя валидация подтверждает спрос, однако сложность UX становится бутылочным горлышком.
futureSimulation.twelveMonths: SolveOS становится индустриальным стандартом для принятия стратегических решений в среднем и крупном бизнесе.

actionPlan.today: Финализировать спецификацию MVP и зафиксировать метрики успеха.
actionPlan.thisWeek: Развернуть инфраструктуру LangGraph для агентов War Room.
actionPlan.thirtyDays: Запустить закрытое альфа-тестирование для 5 ключевых партнеров.
